scripts.generate:kotlin: rm -rf ./generated/kotlin && npx @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i ./generated/openapi.yaml -g kotlin -o ./generated/kotlin --global-property models --additional-properties=serializationLibrary=kotlinx_serialization,packageName=net.aurboda.api,modelPackage=net.aurboda.api.models,dateLibrary=string --type-mappings=decimal=kotlin.Double,number=kotlin.Double,UUID=kotlin.String,uri=kotlin.String,URI=kotlin.String,AnyType=kotlin.String,object=kotlin.String && pnpm generate:kotlin:fixup
scripts.generate:kotlin:fixup: find ./generated/kotlin -name '*.kt' -exec sed -i 's/@Contextual //g' {} + && find ./generated/kotlin -name '*.kt' -exec sed -i '/^import kotlinx.serialization.Contextual$/d' {} + && find ./generated/kotlin -name '*.kt' -exec sed -i '/^import java\.net\.URI$/d' {} + && find ./generated/kotlin -name '*.kt' -exec sed -i 's/) : kotlin.collections.HashMap<String, kotlin.String>()() {/) {/g' {} +
scripts.generate: pnpm generate:openapi && pnpm generate:ts && pnpm generate:kotlin
